name: guildhall
description: The Guildhall — a gathering place for adventurers. A TDD-ordered coding agent harness for Claude Code, tuned for Opus 4.7. An orchestrator (plan + dispatch on Opus) and six workers on Sonnet: prototype-builder, test-author, feature-implementer, refactorer, debug-investigator, plus an optional Playwright ui-test-author. Integrates with IDD-framework specs.
